headline: 暑期档热力不减，悬疑奇幻领跑
headlineEn: Summer Blockbuster Heat Continues, Suspense and Fantasy Lead
summary: 今日娱乐焦点：悬疑剧《鬼谜东宫》与科幻片《奥德赛》持续霸榜，新片《星光继承者：暗黑仙境》引发关注。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment focus: Suspense drama 'Ghost Mystery East Palace' and sci-fi 'Odyssey' continue to dominate, with new film 'Descendants: The Dark Wonderland' drawing attention.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅1部，市场聚焦存量热片。
industryHighlights.en: Only 1 new movie this week, market focuses on existing hits.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》定档引发期待。
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' release date sparks anticipation.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》预告热度攀升。
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' trailer gains traction.
